# CWE-289 — Authentication Bypass by Alternate Name (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-289-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

// Vulnerable: only compares bare username, ignoring domain aliases.
func LookupPrincipal(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodGet {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	who := r.URL.Query().Get("user")
	if who == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing user", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var count int
	_ = db.QueryRow("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM principals WHERE name = ?", strings.Split(who, "@")[0]).Scan(&count)
	if count > 0 {
		w.Header().Set("X-Authenticated", "true")
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
